testPlanTitle: CBOT-475 - Conversational AI Careersite Agent - Basic Functionality
scope: Verify core functionality of the conversational AI agent on the careersite, including initial interaction, job search, and response handling. Focus on UI elements and basic conversation flow.

testCases.title: Initial Chat Interaction - Valid Query
steps: Initiate a chat session with the AI agent.
Enter a valid job query (e.g., 'Registered Nurse jobs').
testCases.expectedResult: The AI agent responds with relevant job listings or prompts for further clarification. The chat interface remains responsive and displays the query and response clearly.

testCases.title: No Jobs Found - Handling Empty Results
steps: Initiate a chat session with the AI agent.
Enter a job query that is expected to return no results (e.g., 'Unicorn Wrangler jobs').
testCases.expectedResult: The AI agent displays a user-friendly message indicating that no jobs were found matching the criteria, and suggests alternative search terms or broader queries. No future jobs are created.

testCases.title: Invalid Input - Non-Job Related Query
steps: Initiate a chat session with the AI agent.
Enter a query unrelated to job searching (e.g., 'What is the weather today?').
testCases.expectedResult: The AI agent responds with a polite message indicating it can only assist with job-related inquiries, or redirects the conversation back to job searching. The chat interface does not crash or display errors.

testCases.title: Job Listing Interaction - View Details
steps: Initiate a chat session and search for a job (e.g., 'Software Engineer').
Select a job listing from the results.
Verify the job details page loads correctly.
testCases.expectedResult: The job details page loads successfully, displaying accurate information about the selected job, including title, description, location, and salary (if available).

testCases.title: Chat Widget Responsiveness - Multiple Queries
steps: Enter a series of different job queries (e.g., 'Data Scientist', 'Project Manager', 'Marketing Specialist') in quick succession.
Observe the chat widget's response time and behavior.
testCases.expectedResult: The chat widget responds to each query without significant delays or errors. The chat history is displayed correctly, and the interface remains responsive throughout the interaction.
